calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Report On Placement And The Proposed Medical Treatment
Off Calendar Aug-25-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Aleeta Van Runkle (Deputy City Attorney) for San Francisco General Hospital.

The Court stated the matter was on for status on placement of the proposed consevatee, that a petition for conservatorship was filed, that the petition is set for September 8, 2011, and that this matter could go off calendar. Ms. Van Runkle stated that Mr. Gilmore was placed at Laguna Honda in a secured unit and that he's doing well.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR #11312. Court Investigator: Melinda Gean. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chen.
